title: mariscus grayi
intro: Mariscus grayi, also known as Marsh Club-rush, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with Mariscus grayi include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
